_comment: Trusted Local Runner workspace roots. Paths are canonicalized (and compared case-insensitively on Windows) before use. The GitHub Actions checkout ($GITHUB_WORKSPACE) is trusted automatically during workflow runs. For manual invocations on a self-hosted runner, add that machine's explicit runner work dir below (do NOT trust by path-name pattern). Add future approved roots here (per-platform 'windows'/'posix' or shared 'common'), or set $AXIOM_LOCAL_RUNNER_WORKSPACE_ROOTS (os.pathsep-separated). Built-in defaults in local_runner.py remain as a fallback. Do NOT add broad roots like 'C:\' or '/'.
